DeleteProjectWarning: All tickets and associated data will be permanently deleted. The workspace folder on disk is NOT deleted.
CreationSetupIntro: Configure the workspace for this new project, then click Initialize to create it and install the agent templates.
OnboardingIntro1: KittyClaw is a kanban that orchestrates agentic projects. Each column is a stage, tickets flow between stages, and LLM agents (programmer, groomer, producer, QA, committer, code-janitor, evaluator) pick up and process them automatically based on triggers you configure.
OnboardingIntro2: You create a project, point it at a workspace folder, initialize the agent templates, and the background engine dispatches Claude Code subprocesses to work on your tickets.
OnboardingMissingWarning: KittyClaw can run without these, but agent dispatch and git commits will fail. Install the missing tools and make sure they are on your PATH (environment variables), then click Recheck.
